welcome.subtitle: The Official Website of Barangay Tibanga, Iligan City
welcome.newHereText: **New Here?** Go to our Barangay Office and have yourself registered

about.heading: About Barangay Tibanga
about.description: Barangay Tibanga is a progressive community in Iligan City, committed to serving our residents with excellence and transparency. We strive to provide accessible services and maintain open communication with all community members.

cards.title: Community Services
cards.description: We offer various community programs and services to enhance the quality of life for all residents.

cards.title: Local Government
cards.description: Transparent and accountable local governance dedicated to serving the people of Tibanga.

cards.title: Public Safety
cards.description: Maintaining peace and order through community cooperation and effective safety measures.

services.heading: Our Services
services.description: We provide various document and administrative services to make government processes more accessible to our community.

cards.title: Document Requests
cards.description: Barangay clearance, certificates of residency, indigency certificates, and other official documents.

cards.title: Business Permits
cards.description: Assistance with barangay business permit applications and renewals for local entrepreneurs.

cards.title: Community Records
cards.description: Maintenance of resident records, birth registrations, and other vital community documentation.

cards.title: Mediation Services
cards.description: Peaceful resolution of community disputes through our mediation and conflict resolution programs.
